description: A customer has placed three small orders going to the same address on the same day. The system should combine them into a single, larger shipment to save on costs.

nodes.task_description: The system's shipping process identifies multiple unshipped orders for the same customer address.

expected_outcome.expected: The system flags the orders as candidates for consolidation.

nodes.task_description: The system creates a single, combined shipment and links the three original orders to it.
The packing instructions now show all items from all three orders to be packed in one box.

expected_outcome.expected: The warehouse receives a single packing list for the combined shipment.
